name: NexusAI Prompt Pack v1.0
author: NexusAI Team
description: A curated collection of 50+ high-quality AI prompts for various use cases

content_writing.title: Blog Post Generator
content_writing.prompt: Write a comprehensive blog post about [TOPIC]. Structure it with an engaging introduction that hooks the reader, 3-5 main sections with subheadings, practical examples, and a conclusion with a call-to-action. Target audience: [AUDIENCE]. Tone: [TONE]. Word count: approximately [COUNT] words.
content_writing.example_usage: TOPIC=AI in Healthcare, AUDIENCE=medical professionals, TONE=professional yet accessible, COUNT=1500

content_writing.title: Social Media Caption Writer
content_writing.prompt: Create 5 engaging social media captions for [PLATFORM] about [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. Each caption should: 1) Start with a hook, 2) Include a value proposition, 3) End with a clear CTA, 4) Use relevant emojis, 5) Include 3-5 hashtag suggestions. Brand voice: [VOICE].
content_writing.example_usage: PLATFORM=Instagram, PRODUCT/SERVICE=eco-friendly water bottles, VOICE=fun and eco-conscious

content_writing.title: Email Newsletter Draft
content_writing.prompt: Draft a [TYPE] email newsletter for [COMPANY] targeting [AUDIENCE]. Subject line options (give 3). The email should include: a personalized greeting, main content about [TOPIC], a secondary story/tip, and a compelling CTA. Keep it under [WORDS] words. Tone: [TONE].
content_writing.example_usage: TYPE=weekly, COMPANY=TechStartup Inc, AUDIENCE=subscribers, TOPIC=new feature launch, WORDS=300, TONE=exciting

content_writing.title: Product Description Writer
content_writing.prompt: Write a compelling product description for [PRODUCT]. Include: a catchy headline, 2-3 sentence overview, 5 key features with benefits (not just features), technical specifications section, and a persuasive closing. Target customer: [CUSTOMER]. Price point: [PRICE].
content_writing.example_usage: PRODUCT=wireless noise-canceling headphones, CUSTOMER=remote workers, PRICE=$149

content_writing.title: SEO Article Outline
content_writing.prompt: Create a detailed SEO-optimized article outline for the keyword '[KEYWORD]'. Include: suggested title (with keyword), meta description (155 chars), H2 and H3 headings structure, key points under each section, internal linking suggestions, FAQ section (5 questions), and estimated word count per section. Search intent: [INTENT].

coding_assistance.title: Code Review Assistant
coding_assistance.prompt:
Review the following [LANGUAGE] code for: 1) Bugs and potential errors, 2) Performance issues, 3) Security vulnerabilities, 4) Code style and best practices, 5) Suggest improvements with code examples. Rate severity of each issue (low/medium/high). Code:

```[LANGUAGE]
[CODE]
```

coding_assistance.title: API Design Helper
coding_assistance.prompt: Design a RESTful API for [SYSTEM]. Include: 1) Resource endpoints (CRUD), 2) HTTP methods and status codes, 3) Request/response JSON schemas, 4) Authentication approach, 5) Rate limiting strategy, 6) Pagination approach, 7) Error handling format. Follow [STANDARD] conventions.

coding_assistance.title: Unit Test Generator
coding_assistance.prompt:
Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following [LANGUAGE] function using [FRAMEWORK]. Cover: 1) Happy path scenarios, 2) Edge cases, 3) Error handling, 4) Boundary values, 5) Mock dependencies where needed. Include setup/teardown. Aim for >90% coverage.

Function:
```[LANGUAGE]
[FUNCTION]
```

coding_assistance.title: Database Schema Designer
coding_assistance.prompt: Design a database schema for [APPLICATION] using [DATABASE]. Include: 1) Table definitions with columns and types, 2) Primary and foreign keys, 3) Indexes for common queries, 4) Constraints and validations, 5) Sample queries for [USE_CASES]. Consider normalization up to 3NF.
coding_assistance.example_usage: APPLICATION=social media app, DATABASE=PostgreSQL, USE_CASES=feed generation, user search, messaging

coding_assistance.title: Debug Assistant
coding_assistance.prompt:
Help me debug this [LANGUAGE] error. Error message: [ERROR]. Context: [CONTEXT]. Code:
```[LANGUAGE]
[CODE]
```
Please: 1) Explain what's causing the error, 2) Show the fix with code, 3) Explain why the fix works, 4) Suggest how to prevent similar issues.
coding_assistance.example_usage: LANGUAGE=JavaScript, ERROR=TypeError: Cannot read property 'map' of undefined

business_strategy.title: SWOT Analysis Generator
business_strategy.prompt: Conduct a comprehensive SWOT analysis for [COMPANY/PRODUCT] in the [INDUSTRY] industry. For each quadrant (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats), provide: 5-7 detailed points with brief explanations, prioritize by impact, suggest 3 strategic actions based on the analysis. Consider current market trends in [YEAR].

business_strategy.title: Pitch Deck Outline
business_strategy.prompt: Create a 12-slide pitch deck outline for [STARTUP] seeking [FUNDING_AMOUNT] in [ROUND] funding. Include for each slide: title, key message, supporting data points needed, and visual suggestions. Cover: problem, solution, market size, business model, traction, team, competition, financials, ask, and use of funds.

business_strategy.title: Competitor Analysis Framework
business_strategy.prompt: Analyze [NUMBER] competitors of [COMPANY] in the [MARKET] market. For each competitor: 1) Product overview, 2) Pricing model, 3) Target audience, 4) Key differentiators, 5) Strengths vs weaknesses compared to us. Create a comparison matrix and recommend our positioning strategy.
business_strategy.example_usage: NUMBER=5, COMPANY=our AI chatbot, MARKET=customer support automation

data_analysis.title: Data Insights Extractor
data_analysis.prompt:
Analyze the following dataset/metrics and provide: 1) Key trends and patterns, 2) Anomalies or outliers, 3) Correlations between variables, 4) Actionable insights (at least 5), 5) Recommended next steps, 6) Visualization suggestions. Data context: [CONTEXT]. Data:
[DATA]
data_analysis.example_usage: CONTEXT=monthly website analytics for SaaS product

data_analysis.title: Survey Results Analyzer
data_analysis.prompt:
Analyze these survey results from [RESPONDENTS] respondents about [TOPIC]. Provide: 1) Executive summary, 2) Key findings (top 5), 3) Demographic breakdown, 4) Sentiment analysis, 5) Statistical significance notes, 6) Recommendations based on findings, 7) Suggested follow-up questions. Results:
[RESULTS]

creative.title: Image Prompt Crafter
creative.prompt: Create [NUMBER] detailed image generation prompts for [CONCEPT]. Each prompt should include: subject description, art style (e.g., photorealistic, watercolor, 3D render), lighting details, color palette, composition notes, mood/atmosphere, and camera angle. Format for [TOOL].

creative.title: Story Plot Generator
creative.prompt: Generate a [GENRE] story plot with: 1) Premise (2-3 sentences), 2) Main character profile, 3) Antagonist/conflict, 4) Three-act structure outline, 5) Key plot twists (2-3), 6) Themes explored, 7) Opening scene description, 8) Potential ending variations (3 options). Setting: [SETTING]. Target audience: [AUDIENCE].
creative.example_usage: GENRE=sci-fi thriller, SETTING=Mars colony 2150, AUDIENCE=young adults

education.title: Lesson Plan Creator
education.prompt: Create a detailed lesson plan for teaching [SUBJECT] to [LEVEL] students. Duration: [DURATION]. Include: 1) Learning objectives (3-5), 2) Materials needed, 3) Warm-up activity, 4) Main lesson structure with timing, 5) Interactive exercises, 6) Assessment method, 7) Homework assignment, 8) Differentiation strategies for advanced/struggling students.
education.example_usage: SUBJECT=Introduction to Machine Learning, LEVEL=college freshman, DURATION=90 minutes

education.title: Concept Explainer
education.prompt: Explain [CONCEPT] in [NUMBER] different ways: 1) Simple analogy (for a 10-year-old), 2) Technical explanation (for a professional), 3) Visual/diagram description, 4) Real-world example, 5) Historical context. Then provide: 3 common misconceptions, 5 quiz questions with answers, and recommended resources for deeper learning.
